title: The Waiting is the Hardest Part
excerpt: I've been keeping a secret for quite some time, and I am so thrilled to finally be able to share… As a long-time subscriber and admirer of the talents in this fantastic community, I am truly honored to be part…
body:
I've been keeping a secret for quite some time, and I am so thrilled to finally be able to share…

As a long-time subscriber and admirer of the talents in this fantastic community, I am truly honored to be part of the Studio Calico design team! It was exactly a year ago when I was a guest designer. Here are a couple sneaks at what I did as soon as I tore into the September kits (available for sale on Aug 27):

In addition to the new designers, there's also new kit on the block! The brand new Studio Calico Card Kit is packed full of cardmaking supplies including an exclusive 6x6 paper pad and stamp set, cardstock, and embellishments. First kit ships early September 2012. Now accepting subscription preorders. Sign up here for the Studio Calico card kit waiting list. It's worth it for the exclusive paper pad & stamps alone. Can't wait to share more with you all soon!
